title: Dakota del Norte
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in North Dakota

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in North Dakota

You can apply for Medicaid in North Dakota by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in North Dakota

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in North Dakota

Health Insurance Marketplace® in North Dakota

CHIP in North Dakota

CHIP covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for CHIP right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about CHIP in North Dakota.

CHIP covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for CHIP right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about CHIP in North Dakota.
